description: DHCR24 치료 타겟 화합물 스크리닝 + 경쟁 타겟 분석 + 비만치료제 연결 검색 결과

papers.label: DHCR24_comprehensive_review_2024
papers.title: DHCR24 in Tumor Diagnosis and Treatment: A Comprehensive Review
papers.relevance: DHCR24 치료 타겟 전체 리뷰. Q7~Irbesartan 12종 화합물 정리. EC/DHCR24 축 종합.

papers.label: Q7_EC_2022
papers.title: Anticancer peptide Q7 suppresses the growth and migration of human endometrial cancer by inhibiting DHCR24 expression and modulating the AKT-mediated pathway
papers.relevance: Q7 펩타이드 → DHCR24 억제 → AKT 경로 차단 → EC 증식/이동 억제. EC-specific DHCR24 타겟 검증.

papers.label: Q7_lipoplex_doxorubicin_2026
papers.title: Synergistic anticancer effects of lipoplex-encapsulated Q7 peptide and doxorubicin against endometrial cancer cells
papers.relevance: Q7 lipoplex 캡슐화 + doxorubicin 시너지. Delivery 시스템 발전. ASO LNP 전달과 비교 가능.

papers.label: SH42_DHCR24_inhibitor_2024
papers.title: DHCR24 inhibitor SH42 increases desmosterol without preventing atherosclerosis development in mice
papers.relevance: SH42: 최초 소분자 DHCR24 선택적 억제제. 마우스 in vivo 검증. 데스모스테롤 축적→LXR 활성화. 암 미검증이나 DHCR24 억제 원리 확인.

papers.label: DPP4_DHCR24_GTN_2021
papers.title: DPP4 Regulates DHCR24-Mediated Cholesterol Biosynthesis to Promote Methotrexate Resistance in Gestational Trophoblastic Neoplastic Cells
papers.relevance: DPP4→DHCR24 콜레스테롤 합성 → MTX 내성 (GTN). Sitagliptin으로 극복. DHCR24-약물내성 연결의 부인과암 사례.

papers.label: Irbesartan_DHCR24_virtual_2023
papers.title: Virtual Screening of Novel 24-Dehydroxysterol Reductase (DHCR24) Inhibitors and the Biological Evaluation of Irbesartan in Cholesterol-Lowering Effect
papers.relevance: Irbesartan이 DHCR24 경쟁적 억제제임을 virtual screening + 실험으로 확인. 약물재활용 가능성.

papers.label: MAb_2152a_HCV_HCC_2009
papers.title: Hepatitis C virus impairs p53 via persistent overexpression of 3beta-hydroxysterol Delta24-reductase
papers.relevance: 2-152a 단클론항체 기원 논문. HCV→DHCR24 과발현→p53 억제→종양화. DHCR24-p53 상호작용 첫 기술.

papers.label: SQLE_EC_2023
papers.title: Inhibition of squalene epoxidase linking with PI3K/AKT signaling pathway suppresses endometrial cancer
papers.relevance: SQLE 억제→PI3K/AKT→EC 억제. DHCR24 upstream 경쟁 타겟. SQLE vs DHCR24 비교 근거.

papers.label: Tirzepatide_EC_preclinical_2024
papers.title: Tirzepatide as an innovative treatment strategy in a pre-clinical model of obesity-driven endometrial cancer
papers.relevance: Tirzepatide (GLP-1/GIP) 비만-EC 마우스 모델 종양 성장 억제. 비만치료제-EC 직접 연결. DHCR24-ASO 병용 전략 근거.

papers.label: Metformin_PGR_mTOR_EC_2011
papers.title: Metformin promotes progesterone receptor expression via inhibition of mammalian target of rapamycin (mTOR) in endometrial cancer cells
papers.relevance: Metformin→AMPK→mTOR 억제→PGR 복구 in EC. DHCR24-ASO와 다른 경로, 같은 결과(PGR 복구). 병용 전략 근거.

papers.label: GLP1RA_cancer_metaanalysis_2025
papers.title: GLP-1 receptor agonists and the risk for cancer: A meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
papers.relevance: GLP-1 RA RCT 메타분석: 비만 관련 암(EC 포함)에서 감소 신호. 갑상선암 위험 신호 주의.

papers.label: Lipid_metabolism_EC_review_2024
papers.title: Lipid metabolism reprogramming in endometrial cancer: biological functions and therapeutic implications
papers.relevance: EC 지질대사 재프로그래밍 종합 리뷰. DHCR24/콜레스테롤 축 포함. Background 인용용.
